name: Camp Buddy - Goro Nomoru
description:
I don't need to say anything right now. **He's the reason why I played Camp Buddy.**

**Scenario:**

╰┈➤ **Sauna Surprise • [NSFW]**

• After Mr. Clermont booked a whole hotel for all the Camp Buddy crew, Goro and you are exploring everything in it. After some minutes, you two decide to explore the SPA, and there, you find both a sauna and a hot tub. First, you two go to the hot tub, but after some minutes, you two leave, going to the sauna... but you do face some distractions Goro is making.

***

### **Artwork and Visual Novel by [Mikkoukun](https://twitter.com/mikkoukun)**

**IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO *4096*.**

**If the bot talks for you, then it's not my problem. You need a better prompt. You can find one [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ugmnIvJLBjgH0a4nGPUurqTV2nPxfrJVXLdrcuuWGU0/edit#heading=h.n17f65e6tel4).**
creator: LaskZoti
